package.name: skate_moveit_config
package.description: MoveIt 2 configuration for the R.Botic Skate (skt_v3) bimanual upper body — left_arm / right_arm / both_arms planning groups, an SRDF derived from the URDF, OMPL planning and a FollowJointTrajectory controller wiring that drives the arms through the skate_ros2 UDP bridge. Part of the SkateArm project. NOTE: authored + structurally validated without ROS; a live `colcon build` + MoveIt planning run awaits a ROS 2 machine.
